ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the vendor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the vendor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the vendor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the vendor */,
  "service_area" TEXT /* Geographical area where the vendor operates */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the vendor */,
  "number_of_vehicles" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles the vendor has */,
  "last_audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last audit or inspection of the vendor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood or district */,
  "city" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the area */,
  "traffic_index" REAL /* Traffic index or congestion level of the location */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Typical weather conditions of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_types" (
  "payment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment type */,
  "payment_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment type (e.g., Cash, Credit Card) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the payment type */,
  "service_fee" REAL /* Service fee associated with the payment type */,
  "max_amount" REAL /* Maximum amount that can be processed using the payment type */,
  "min_amount" REAL /* Minimum amount that can be processed using the payment type */,
  "accepted_currencies" TEXT /* List of accepted currencies for the payment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rate_codes" (
  "rate_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate code */,
  "rate_description" TEXT /* Description of the rate code */,
  "base_fare" REAL /* Base fare amount for the rate code */,
  "per_mile_rate" REAL /* Rate per mile for the rate code */,
  "per_minute_rate" REAL /* Rate per minute for the rate code */,
  "surcharge_rules" TEXT /* Additional surcharge rules applicable to the rate code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the vendor the driver works for */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the driver */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the driver */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the driver */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the driver */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the driver */,
  "joining_date" TEXT /* Date the driver joined the company */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the driver left the company (if applicable) */,
  "total_miles_driven" REAL /* Total miles driven by the driver */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating received by the driver */,
  "number_of_trips" INTEGER /* Total number of trips completed by the driver */,
  "total_earnings" REAL /* Total earnings of the driver */,
  "last_training_date" TEXT /* Date of the last training session completed by the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the taxi vendor */,
  "trip_date" TEXT /* Date for which statistics are recorded */,
  "total_trips" INTEGER /* Total number of trips taken on that date */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated from trips on that date */,
  "average_trip_duration" REAL /* Average duration of trips */,
  "average_passenger_count" REAL /* Average number of passengers per trip */,
  "average_fare_amount" REAL /* Average fare amount per trip */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of trips */,
  "number_of_ratings" INTEGER /* Total number of ratings received */,
  "number_of_complaints" INTEGER /* Total number of complaints received */,
  "number_of_cancellations" INTEGER /* Total number of trip cancellations */,
  "number_of_no_shows" INTEGER /* Total number of no-shows */,
  "total_distance_traveled" REAL /* Total distance traveled by all trips */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_statistics_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for driver performance record */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the driver the performance is tracked for */,
  "total_trips" INTEGER /* Total trips completed by the driver */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating received by the driver */,
  "revenue_generated" REAL /* Total revenue generated by the driver */,
  "total_distance_driven" REAL /* Total distance driven by the driver */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the driver */,
  "number_of_complaints" INTEGER /* Total number of complaints received by the driver */,
  "number_of_cancellations" INTEGER /* Total number of trip cancellations by the driver */,
  "number_of_no_shows" INTEGER /* Total number of no-shows by the driver */,
  "total_tips_received" REAL /* Total tips received by the driver */,
  "last_performance_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the last performance review */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Overall performance rating of the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_performance_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surcharges" (
  "surcharge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each surcharge */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the surcharge */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the surcharge */,
  "applicable_areas" TEXT /* Geographical areas where the surcharge applies */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the surcharge */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the surcharge */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the surcharge is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("surcharge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the trip for which feedback is submitted */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the passenger giving feedback */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the passenger */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments submitted by the passenger */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_source" TEXT /* Source of the feedback (e.g., app, phone, email) */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, suggestion) */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the feedback is anonymous */,
  "driver_response" TEXT /* Driver's response to the feedback */,
  "admin_response" TEXT /* Administrative response to the feedback */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback resolution (e.g., resolved, in progress, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_feedback_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the passenger */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the passenger */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the passenger */,
  "total_trips_taken" INTEGER /* Total number of trips taken by the passenger */,
  "total_fare_spent" REAL /* Total fare amount spent by the passenger */,
  "average_rating_given" REAL /* Average rating given by the passenger */,
  "total_complaints_made" INTEGER /* Total number of complaints made by the passenger */,
  "total_tips_given" REAL /* Total amount of tips given by the passenger */,
  "last_trip_date" TEXT /* Date of the last trip taken by the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)
